name: Solid Bathroom Wastebasket Clear - Room Essentials™: Plastic, 10.5" High, 6.5L Acrylic Trash Container
description:
Create an interior decor setting with plenty of functionality and sleek design when you add the Solid Bathroom Wastebasket from Room Essentials™ to your space. Featuring a simple, polished construction and a cylindrical shape, this clear bathroom wastebasket easily incorporates with your existing decor, and the plastic material offers reliable use. Tuck it under your bathroom sink or place it in the corner for a practical accent you'll appreciate.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
